title: Link Steam to Content Manager & Discord

messages.content: # Questioning whether Content Manager & Discord are linked to Steam? Follow this guide!

## How to link steam to content manager
> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > General Tab > Steam Profile > Make sure your SteamIDs match

# How to link steam to discord
> Press on the User Settings next to your username > Connections > Click Steam Icon and follow linking process
-# If whitelisting issues are not resolved, restart your computer and try to join again.
